name: unity-asset-viewer-extension
description: Chrome extension to review Unity Prefabs in GitHub and GitLab MRs

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@unity-asset-viewer/core-parser && npm run build --workspace=@unity-asset-viewer/core-renderer && npm run build --workspace=@unity-asset-viewer/chrome-extension && npm run build --workspace=@unity-asset-viewer/vscode-extension
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@unity-asset-viewer/core-parser && npm run test --workspace=@unity-asset-viewer/core-renderer
